description:
MOTIVATION
A --log-telemetry build of fixtures/quicksort spends ~36% of wall time (40ms/121ms) in codegen with ZERO telemetry. compile_with_backend_surface (src/compiler2/native_codegen/driver.rs:1036) emits only a per-spec 'fz/codegen/lower_function' span (fz IR -> cranelift IR, ~3.5ms total). The expensive work is uninstrumented: per-function verify+define_function (native compile, the ~40ms of inter-span gaps) and the entire post-loop emit+finalize tail (after the last log line, cost unknown). There is also no enclosing codegen span, so every span lands at parent=0 and gaps are unattributable.

DESIGN (mirror the function's phase structure; closed accounting by construction)
Add an enclosing 'fz/codegen/compile' span over the whole surface body (keystone/denominator; parent linkage is automatic via bus.rs span_stack so all children nest). Then bracket the three uninstrumented regions so compile = declare + Sum(lower+define) + emit_runtime + finalize with no mystery gaps:
  - fz/codegen/declare       wraps setup/declarations (1045-1088)
  - fz/codegen/define_function  per-spec; wraps verify_function + define_function (1164-1177); stop payload code_bytes (ctx.compiled_code().code_buffer().len()), spec_id, fn_id, instruction_count
  - fz/codegen/emit_runtime  wraps receive_dispatch/mid_flight_cont/callable_entry/resume body emission (1181-1213)
  - fz/codegen/finalize      wraps emit_metadata_carriers + backend.finalize (1244-1245)
Add Backend::kind()->&'static str (jit/aot) for the compile span metadata (finalize cost differs sharply between JIT mmap+reloc and AOT object emit).

PARITY: compile_with_backend_surface is the shared generic over B: Backend, so JIT and AOT both get this for free; interpreter does not codegen (three-path parity satisfied at the shared seam).

TDD: drive_test.rs capture test (model: compiler2_native_program_jit_runs_quicksort_through_compiler2_codegen) asserting exactly one compile span; declare/emit_runtime/finalize present once each with parent==compile; define_function count == lower_function count, all parented to compile; each define_function stop carries code_bytes>=1.

DOCS: update .agent codegen telemetry surface doc + any codegen guide listing emitted spans.

FOLLOW-UPS (new tickets, do not fold in):
  - ir_codegen/driver.rs appears to be a legacy twin (compiler.rs only calls native_codegen) carrying the same loop -> confirm dead + remove.
  - If emit_runtime turns out hot, drill into per-helper define_function spans for trampoline/dispatch/entry bodies.
title: Close native codegen telemetry accounting: span declare/define/emit_runtime/finalize under one compile span
